role_in_stack: Spectral realization layer for coordination structure within VTFA/RVT.
core_statement: Coordination regimes in complex systems arise from the spectral modes of their interaction structure. Stability and regime transitions are governed by regulatory constraints that limit the dimensionality and amplitude of those modes.

connection_to_vtfa.accessibility_role: Spectral coordination determines which differentiated modes remain feasible under constraint.
connection_to_vtfa.viability_role: Viable coordination requires preservation of recoverable differentiated accessibility.
connection_to_vtfa.collapse_role: Collapse appears as low-dimensional modal trapping or loss of recoverable coordination richness.

one_sentence_lock: SCT realizes recursive viability through spectral coordination modes constrained by margin, dimensionality, and recoverable accessibility.
